segments.beat: Two hands hold device face-on toward camera; display lit with game screen visible through transparent pane; green plant background establishes outdoor/lifestyle context
Hands tilt device slightly; see-through display and PCB internals become more legible; D-pad and A/B buttons clearly visible on clear-shell front
Device rotated/angled further; transparent shell lets camera see internal board components; pocket-scale proportions confirmed by hand framing
Hands reposition grip; USB-C port area comes into frame at bottom edge; continued PCB-through-shell visibility; retro control layout prominent
Device pulled slightly back; full form factor visible in both hands; game content still active on display; collectible object quality read from resin shell catch-light
Final hold position; device face presented squarely; display on, internals visible, hands frame pocket scale; clip ends on clean product-in-hand hold

demonstrates.motion_value: high — rotation reveals PCB through shell progressively
high — active game pixels visible throughout entire clip
medium — two-hand hold continuously communicates device footprint
medium — D-pad/A/B layout and active display imply gaming but game content is small
low — resin catch-light and careful hold suggest premium object but no dedicated showcase moment
low — USB-C port briefly visible at bottom edge
medium — clear resin shell gloss and PCB visibility communicate craft quality

selection_note: Continuous two-hand hold with active display and rotating transparency reveal makes this a strong hero loop; no text overlays or cuts that break loop; USB-C port incidentally appears but is not foregrounded.

aesthetics.standout: natural green-leaf backdrop adds organic warmth
aesthetics.weakness: handheld shake throughout, device tiny and underexposed against dark frame borders
aesthetics.note: close-up handheld demo; device never fills frame cleanly, exposure undercooked, constant motion - hard to cut a usable loop
